title: 7 Days of Faith for Small Groups
openingPrayer: Father, open our hearts to Your Word and unite us in love, wisdom, and obedience.
icebreaker: Share one way God has encouraged you this week.
discussionQuestions: What does this passage reveal about God?
What does this passage reveal about our response?
Where do we need to obey this truth as a group?
How can we pray for one another this week?
leaderNotes: Encourage participation, keep the discussion Scripture-centered, and close with practical prayer.
actionStep: Each member should choose one practical obedience step before the next meeting.
